packageRules.description: Hold TypeScript at 6.x: typescript-eslint's supported peer range is '>=4.8.4 <6.1.0', and eslint crashes under the native TS 7 compiler ('Cannot read properties of undefined (reading Cjs)'). Revisit when typescript-eslint supports TypeScript 7.

Hold apps/web Vite at 8.0.x: 8.1.x (Rolldown) drops top-level bindings in the Storybook production build, breaking Chromatic with 'ReferenceError: ... is not defined' (MSW checkGlobals). See https://github.com/storybookjs/storybook/issues/33789. Revisit when Storybook supports Vite 8/Rolldown.
